title: Compliance overview
subtitle: Read-only overview of school configuration.
appointedAdminParagraph: The administrator alone configures policies and grants access. No vendor, founder, or unappointed person has access to incident data. Permissions can only be set or revoked by the appointed data controller.

policies.heading: Policy library
policies.intro: Upload your school's safeguarding policies and core documents. Items marked Required must be in place for compliance.

safeguarding.title: Safeguarding & Child Protection Policy
safeguarding.helper: Comprehensive policy on protecting pupils from all forms of harm.

antiBullying.title: Anti-Bullying Policy
antiBullying.helper: Prevention, reporting, response and follow-up of bullying incidents.

behaviour.title: Behaviour Policy / Code of Conduct
behaviour.helper: Expected conduct for pupils and staff.

onlineSafety.title: Online Safety & Acceptable Use
onlineSafety.helper: Use of digital tools, devices and platforms by pupils and staff.

send.title: SEND Policy
send.helper: Special educational needs and disabilities provision.

complaints.title: Complaints Procedure
complaints.helper: How families and staff raise concerns.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection & GDPR Policy
dataProtection.helper: How personal data is collected, stored and shared.

convivencia.title: Plan de Convivencia
convivencia.helper: School coexistence and conflict resolution plan.

lopivi.title: Protocolo LOPIVI
lopivi.helper: Designated wellbeing and protection coordinator protocol.

dataController.intro: Statutory appointments and delegated responsibilities at your school. Counts only — no individual names are shown here.
dataController.comingSoonHint: Coming with the Admin upload tools

frameworks.intro: Safeguarding frameworks this platform is built to support. Each card shows the number of document templates currently available for that framework.
frameworks.footer: Need a framework added or updated? Contact your appointed data controller.
frameworks.explainer1: Spain's 2021 organic law on the integral protection of children and adolescents against violence. It requires every educational centre to appoint a designated wellbeing and protection coordinator and to maintain documented safeguarding protocols, prevention measures, and a clear reporting pathway for any form of violence against a minor.
frameworks.explainer2: The Balearic Islands government's framework for school coexistence and conflict resolution, administered by the Conselleria d'Educació. It defines mandatory protocols for incidents including bullying, cyberbullying, and gender-based violence, and prescribes the documentation and external referral pathways that schools must follow.
frameworks.explainer3: The UK Department for Education's statutory safeguarding guidance, updated annually, that all schools and colleges in England must follow. It requires every institution to designate a Safeguarding Lead, maintain a single central record of staff vetting, and follow a structured response protocol covering identify, assess, decide, and refer.
frameworks.explainer4: Spain's integrated framework for the prevention of and response to gender-based violence, anchored in Organic Law 1/2004 and reinforced by the State Pact against Gender Violence. In educational settings it requires schools to identify and report indicators of violence against women and girls, deliver age-appropriate prevention content, and coordinate with specialist external services.

protocolsCardDescription: Counts of protocols currently logged for this school, grouped by status.
noProtocols: No protocols have been logged yet.
loadError: Could not load admin overview. Please try again.
permissionsExplainer: Permissions are granted by the school's appointed administrator (the designated data controller). Parents see only their own children's data. Teachers see only their own class. Specialist safeguarding staff (Coordinator, Head Teacher, SENCO) see school-wide data within their remit. The PTA sees aggregated, anonymised data only.
permissionsFooter: Reflects current platform configuration as of {{date}}. Permission boundaries are enforced in code.
